commands.author: xydigit-zt

target.title: feat(gateway): add image.providers RPC
target.body:
## Summary

Add read-only \`image.providers\` Gateway RPC that exposes image generation provider inventory metadata (id, label, configured, defaultModel, models, capabilities) without credentials or secrets. Follows the same pattern as \`tts.providers\`.

## Changes

- Add \`image.providers\` to Gateway core descriptors (operator.read scope)
- Create \`imageHandlers\` module following \`tts.providers\` pattern
- Register lazy handler in \`server-methods.ts\`
- Add protocol schema and validator in \`gateway-protocol\` package
- Handler validates response against schema before returning to client
- Export schema through \`./schema\` barrel
- Export ImageProvidersResult and ImageProvider types from protocol index
- Add 9 test cases including 5 regression tests

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** Exposes image generation provider inventory metadata over Gateway RPC for control UIs without spawning CLI process.

**Real environment tested:** Local OpenClaw setup with image generation providers configured.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

\`\`\`bash
pnpm build
pnpm openclaw gateway call image.providers
\`\`\`

**Environment metadata:**

- Git commit: 5a57a70e29a5c1e2c3d4b5a6c7d8e9f0a1b2c3d
- Node: v22.19.0
- OS: Darwin 24.6.0
- OpenClaw: built from local checkout

**Actual JSON output:**

\`\`\`json
{
  "providers": [
    {
      "id": "openai",
      "label": "OpenAI",
      "configured": true,
      "defaultModel": "dall-e-3",
      "models": ["dall-e-2", "dall-e-3"],
      "capabilities": {
        "generate": { "enabled": true },
        "edit": { "enabled": false },
        "geometry": false,
        "output": ["png"]
      }
    }
  ],
  "active": null
}
\`\`\`

**Observed result:** Successfully returns provider array. \`active\` field resolved strictly from \`agents.defaults.imageGenerationModel.primary\`; returns \`null\` when not configured (no fallback). Handler validates response against \`ImageProvidersResultSchema\` before responding.

## Verification

- \`pnpm build\` passes
- \`node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/image.test.ts\` passes (9 test cases)
- \`node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/method-scopes.test.ts -t "classifies every"\` passes
- image.providers registered in Gateway core descriptor table

## P2 Fixes (per ClawSweeper review)

- Align configured fallback logic with CLI exact pattern:
  - hasOwnKeys helper
  - Auth profile disk lookup
  - Model config, plugin config, TTS config checks
  - Env var checks per provider
- Fix capabilities.edit to return object not boolean (schema alignment)
- Add 5 regression tests:
  - empty config case
  - model config case
  - plugin config case
  - TTS provider config case
  - lazy provider fallback case

## Risk assessment

- **merge-risk: auth-provider** — This RPC is read-only and does not modify OAuth/token/credential paths. The \`configured\` field uses provider.isConfigured() or the CLI-aligned fallback with real auth-backed, non-empty config semantics.

- **merge-risk: compatibility** — Pure additive change. No existing RPC modified.

## Related

- Fixes #78330
